title: sabina sphaerica
intro: Sabina sphaerica, also known as Juniperus sabina, is a small evergreen shrub native to Asia and Europe, belonging to the cypress family (Cupressaceae). The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds like terpenes and flavonoids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Sabina sphaerica include relief from digestive issues, such as dyspepsia and constipation, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Sabina sphaerica is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with some herbalists also recommending it as a compress or bath additive for its therapeutic benefits.
